findings.summary: STM32 NRST connected to EEPROM_MOSI net correctly flagged
findings.details: The analyzer correctly identifies that U1 (STM32F103C8Tx) pin 7 (NRST) is on the net 'EEPROM_MOSI', which also connects to U6 (M95320 EEPROM) pin 5. This is a genuine design error.

findings.summary: LDO output_rail reported as unnamed net instead of +3V3 -- 0R jumper not traced
findings.details: U4 (AZ1117-3.3) output_rail is reported as '__unnamed_53' instead of '+3V3'. R16 (0 Ohm) bridges __unnamed_53 to +3V3 but the analyzer does not trace through zero-ohm links.

findings.summary: LCD SPI bus not detected -- SPI signals route through connector J9 rather than directly to an IC
findings.details: The design has two SPI buses: one to the M95320 EEPROM (detected) and one to an external LCD module via connector J9. The LCD SPI signals only appear on connector J9 pins with no SPI-capable IC, so the bus detector does not match them.
